name: url_opener
description: Tool for opening websites and URLs in the browser. Use this when the user wants to open, visit, or navigate to a website (e.g., 'open YouTube', 'go to Google', 'visit GitHub').

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Opens a URL or website in the default browser. Supports both full URLs (https://...) and common website shortcuts (youtube, google, gmail, etc.).

url.description: The URL to open. Can be a full URL (e.g., 'https://youtube.com') or a shortcut name (e.g., 'youtube', 'google', 'gmail', 'github', 'twitter', 'facebook', 'reddit', 'netflix', 'spotify').

query.description: Optional search query. If provided, will search on the specified website (e.g., url='youtube', query='cat videos').
